zh.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Isley是Thomas Isley的女兒，於大約1510年出生在英國。她和Sir Richard Charles Clements至少有3個兒子和3個女兒。她去世於1572年3月1日之後在她的家鄉。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Isley是Thomas Isley的女儿，于大约1510年出生在英国。她和Sir Richard Charles Clements至少有3个儿子和3个女儿。她去世于1572年3月1日之后在她的家乡。

nameMeanings.name: Isley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from a lost or unidentified place, apparently in the east or south of England. There is no clear connection between the surname and Isley Walton in Leicestershire.
Probably an altered form of German Isele, a variant of Eisele .

variants.name: Eisele
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Hans, Kurt, Alfons, Ewald, Gebhard, Gerda, Helmut, Heribert, Hermann, Ingeborg, Juergen, Jurgen.
from a pet form of any of the ancient Germanic personal names formed with īsan ‘iron’ (see Eisel ).

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

en.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Isley was born about 1510, in England as the daughter of Thomas Isley. She had at least 3 sons and 3 daughters with Sir Richard Charles Clements. She died after 1 March 1572, in her hometown.

fr.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Isley est née environ 1510, à Angleterre, fille de Thomas Isley. Elle a eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles avec Sir Richard Charles Clements. Elle est décédée après 1 mars 1572, dans sa ville natale.

de.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Isley wurde um 1510 in England, als Tochter von Thomas Isley geboren. Sie hatte mit Sir Richard Charles Clements mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb nach 1. März 1572 in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Isley è nata il circa 1510 nel England come figlia di Thomas Isley. Lei avuto almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie con Sir Richard Charles Clements. Morì dopo il 1 marzo 1572, nel sua cittadina.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Isleyは約1510年にイギリスでThomas Isleyの娘として生まれた。彼女はSir Richard Charles Clementsとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1572年3月1日以後に故郷で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Isley(은)는 대략 1510년 영국에서 Thomas Isley의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 Sir Richard Charles Clements(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1572년 3월 1일 이후 그녀의 고향에서 사망했다.

mn.about 1510–after 1 March 1572: ойролцоогоор 1510 он–1572 оны Гуравдугаар сарын 1–наас хойш

pt.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Isley nasceu aproximadamente 1510, em Inglaterra filha de Thomas Isley. Ela teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas com Sir Richard Charles Clements. Ela faleceu após 1 de março de 1572, em sua cidade natal.

ru.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Isley родилась около 1510 г. в местности Англия. Её отца звали Thomas Isley. У неё было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери от Sir Richard Charles Clements. Она умерла после 1 марта 1572 г. в её родном городе.

sm.about 1510–after 1 March 1572: e tusa o le 1510–ina ua ma'ea le 1 Mati 1572

es.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Isley nació aproximadamente 1510, en Inglaterra como hija de Thomas Isley. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos y 3 hijas con Sir Richard Charles Clements. Murió después de 1 de marzo de 1572, en su pueblo.
